examples: Figure 1: Workspace showing colorized project artifacts.
Figure 1 shows an example of colorized project artifacts.
This June National Amusements will roll-out a colorized, digitized 3-D production of Night of the Living Dead at some 500 of its cinemas.
The filming of "Pleasantville" also required building of an entire town, which Ross wanted running rampant with false nostalgia to set up the need for colorized lives.
